title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Don Chinjao, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13 as powerful fighters clash in the Colosseum and the scale of the tournament becomes clearer through Elizabello, Chinjao, and the other competitors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...like I thought

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Can't cut any corners if you want to bring this guy down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Bastard

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I said (knock it off!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: UOHH!! He kicked Chinjao's ass!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's with that little bearded guy !!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hiya Haya

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: WaH!!! It had no effect!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The legend, could it be true ....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: that he once broke an Arctic continent with a headbutt....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A WHOLE CONTINENT !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even though I hit him that hard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hiyahoho... you two seem to have talent ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...that strength, there's no doubt about it ... seems like you really are strawhat ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But it's far too soon for you to be facing me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Just leave me alone already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Stealing People's Popularity... Being born the grandson of a demon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You sure are good at getting people to hate you!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Never knew about either of those things!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I mean... I'm Lucy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you're intent on getting in my way, I'll bury you with him, young knight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hold on, gramps!!! That's as far as you go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Uohhhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: You'll be disqualified if you go wild here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UOH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's SAI and Boo from Kanokun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Take your hands off of me, precious grandchildren ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: No way. I don't know what this is about, but you have to stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: I've finally found him! The bloodline of that detestable GARP!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: If you're disqualified now, then we can't achieve

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Our real objective in entering this tournament!! Gramps!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hey , what are you people doing over there!!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: If you're starting a fight outside of the ring, then we're kicking you out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It's the staff members... well I don't care if they do kick me out. I'm still gonna....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hmm!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Where'd he go!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Gramps!! That little shit with the fake beard ...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: We're in C- Block with him....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: NULI

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: If you wanna kill him...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Do it during the match!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I won't let him get away !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Strawhat ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I will take his life before the match even starts

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What was all the ruckus?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I think I heard someone say "Strawhat" ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Strawhat, huh...

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
